$comment: D-CSUBSET-THREAD-LOCAL (TLS C1, user-requested): the REAL-INCLUDE form of the per-thread discriminator — `#include <pthread.h>` through the shipped neutral descriptor (shippedLibs/pthread.json), composed with an actual mutex: a file-scope `static pthread_mutex_t lock = PTHREAD_MUTEX_INITIALIZER;` (the per-format elf {0} macro variant initializing the opaque arr<i64,6> typedef) guards a shared `sum` while `thread_local counter` does the per-thread part. Two workers each observe counter==105 (template 5 + 100) -> sum==210 and main's copy stays 6; a process-shared alias yields 312/torn and main==206. pthread_create's shipped 3rd param is ptr<void> -> the fn name passes via an explicit (void *)worker cast (bare fn->void* does not implicitly convert in the c-subset).
